creator: killasmurf86@gmail.com
text:
workrave is supposed (depends on configuration) to lock screen and/or user input. This should happend after configurable period of time....

On my FreeBSD desktop PC workrave have never worked.
I use custom enviroment..., but it didn't work on gnome as well (I did test it)

for some reason timers aren't working....

This problem was on FreeBSD-7.X-Stable and FreeBSD-8-Current
